statement.en: EXADPrinter: Semi-Exhaustive Permissionless Device Fingerprinting Within the Android Ecosystem

proposer: Sihem Bouhenniche, Pierre Laperdrix, Walter Rudametkin

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026, future-projected or institutional archive) describing a novel Android fingerprinting technique. The claims are empirically testable but not yet peer-reviewed in final form. The methodology (semi-exhaustive permissionless fingerprinting) is technically sound in principle but requires reproducible validation. Classification as FLOWING reflects pre-publication validation status.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: デバイスの無許可な特性の露出度は、許可レイヤーを貫いて必然的に完全性へ収束する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 許可という壁に囲まれても、デバイスの本質は内側から放射状に漏出し、検出の光となる。
